evals.name: notification-center
evals.prompt: Run /pm:spec for the test-acme project, feature: notification-center. Minimal context provided — the skill must interview to fill gaps.
evals.expected_output: A spec file at test-acme/specs/notification-center.md covering all required sections, with a spec-reviewer report presented at the end.

evals.name: export-reports
evals.prompt: Run /pm:spec for the test-acme project, feature: export-reports. A rough idea is provided: PMs want to export project status reports as PDF or CSV to share with stakeholders who don't have app access.
evals.expected_output: A spec file at test-acme/specs/export-reports.md that builds on the rough idea and fills in missing detail, with a spec-reviewer report presented at the end.

evals.name: guest-access
evals.prompt: Run /pm:spec for the test-acme project, feature: guest-access. Minimal context — this feature has several non-obvious blindspots (link expiry, permissions, archived projects, multi-project isolation).
evals.expected_output: A spec file at test-acme/specs/guest-access.md that surfaces and addresses the non-obvious edge cases, with a spec-reviewer report presented at the end.
